title: capabilities.md + triggers.md — inject tool awareness into system prompt
what_failed: Pi had no injected awareness of when to reach for specific tools. Tool triggers were buried in consciousness.txt or absent entirely.
fix_applied: agent/prompt.py: added _resolve_includes() that replaces {{INCLUDE:filename}} directives in consciousness.txt with contents of prompts/<filename>. prompts/triggers.md: hand-curated per-tool trigger guide (when to fire each of 45+ tools). scripts/refresh_pi.py: emit_capabilities_md() auto-generates prompts/capabilities.md from live get_tool_definitions() on every refresh run.
